untranslatable_reason: RVI (Relative Vigor Index) is not in the allowed indicator list. The signal requires RVI and RVI signal line calculation, which are custom indicators not available. While RSI was substituted as a conceptual alternative for the overbought/peak detection concept, this is not a true translation of the original RVI-based signal.
translation_notes: The original signal uses RVI (Relative Vigor Index) with a specific signal line formula: (RVI + 2×RVI(t-1) + 2×RVI(t-2) + RVI(t-3))/6. RVI is not available in the allowed indicators. RSI_14 and RSI_7 were used as a conceptual substitute to capture the spirit of momentum crossing below a signal line in an overbought scenario, but this is NOT an accurate translation of the original KAUFMAN_DRY_9 signal.
